dashboard.activeSourceHasNoRead: An active Source has not been read yet.
dashboard.activityListMeaning: Recent actions that may require seller follow-up.
dashboard.addSourceToBuildCatalog: Connect a Source to build your product catalog.
dashboard.applyApprovedChanges: Apply the approved changes when you are ready.
dashboard.blockingIssuesEmptyExplanation: Nothing is preventing the current pricing workflow from continuing.
dashboard.blockingIssuesMeaning: Blocking issues must be resolved before the affected products can be published.
dashboard.businessDataUnavailableExplana: FlowHub could not load the current business summary. No values are being estimated.
dashboard.businessOverviewDescription: See what happened, what needs attention, and what to do next.
dashboard.catalogIsEmpty: No products are currently available for daily work.
dashboard.channelListMeaning: Destinations requiring seller attention appear first.
dashboard.channelsAwaitingVerification_o: {{value}} Channel has not been verified yet.
{{value}} Channels have not been verified yet.
dashboard.channelsMeaning: Channels are the destinations where approved changes can be published.
dashboard.checkingDailyServices: Checking the services needed for daily work.
dashboard.configureChannel: Configure an active Channel before publishing changes.
dashboard.connectSourceForDailyWork: Connect a Source to bring product and pricing data into FlowHub.
dashboard.controlCenterSummary: Your control center for today's products, Sources, and Channels.
dashboard.dailyServicesAvailable: Everything required for daily work is available.
dashboard.dailyServicesNotConfirmed: FlowHub could not confirm the services needed for daily work.
dashboard.failedUpdatesExplanation: {{failed}} failed and {{pending}} pending marketplace updates require attention.
dashboard.fixBlockingProducts: Fix the blocking products before Review or Apply.
dashboard.fixSourceConnections: Fix Source connections before the next review.
dashboard.freshnessMeaning: A recorded Source read lets you confirm which data is being used.
dashboard.inventoryMeaning: Out-of-stock products may need replenishment or a status update.
dashboard.loadingBusinessMetrics: Loading persisted business activity without estimating unavailable values.
dashboard.monitorPendingUpdates: Monitor pending updates until verification is complete.
dashboard.noActivityActionRequired: No recent activity requires your attention.
dashboard.noPublishingDestinations: No publishing destination is currently active.
dashboard.noSourceDataAvailable: No Source data is available for the daily workflow.
dashboard.openDiagnosticsToResolve: Open Diagnostics and resolve the connection problem.
dashboard.ordersMeaning: Today’s synchronized orders show current sales activity; currencies remain separate.
dashboard.ordersTodayEmptyExplanation: No synchronized order has been recorded today.
dashboard.outOfStockEmptyExplanation: No enabled Listing is currently recorded with zero stock.
dashboard.outOfStockExplanation_one: {{value}} product is recorded as out of stock.
dashboard.outOfStockExplanation_other: {{value}} products are recorded as out of stock.
dashboard.pendingUpdatesExplanation_one: {{value}} update is waiting for completion or reconciliation.
dashboard.pendingUpdatesExplanation_othe: {{value}} updates are waiting for completion or reconciliation.
dashboard.productChangesEmptyExplanation: No current Draft contains product changes.
dashboard.productChangesExplanation_one: {{value}} product has a current Draft change.
dashboard.productChangesMeaning: Changed products contain target values that differ from their current saved state.
dashboard.productsAvailable_one: {{value}} product is available for daily work.
dashboard.productsAvailable_other: {{value}} products are available for daily work.
dashboard.productsMeaning: These are the products FlowHub can show for review and publishing.
dashboard.readSourceBeforeReview: Read a Source before reviewing today's changes.
dashboard.readyForApplyEmptyExplanation: No selected, current Review is waiting for Apply.
dashboard.readyForApplyExplanation_one: {{value}} product has an approved selected change.
dashboard.readyForApplyMeaning: Ready for Apply counts only current, selected Review items without an active Apply job.
dashboard.readyForReviewEmptyExplanation: No changed Draft is currently waiting for Review.
dashboard.readyForReviewExplanation_one: {{value}} changed product is waiting for Review.
dashboard.readyForReviewExplanation_othe: {{value}} changed products are waiting for Review.
dashboard.readyForReviewMeaning: Review confirms the exact target changes before Dry Run and Apply.
dashboard.retryBusinessSummary: Retry the business summary without changing marketplace data.
dashboard.reviewFailedUpdates: Review failed updates and reconciliation before retrying.
dashboard.reviewInventoryAlerts: Review inventory alerts and replenish or update affected products.
dashboard.reviewLatestSourceRead: Confirm the latest Source read before today's review.
dashboard.reviewManagedProducts: Open Products to review the current catalog.
dashboard.reviewWarnings: Review warnings before publishing affected products.
dashboard.sourceListMeaning: Connected inputs and their latest successful reads.
dashboard.sourcesMeaning: Sources provide the product and pricing data used in your daily workflow.
dashboard.systemMeaning: System availability determines whether daily review and publishing can continue.
dashboard.updatesCompleteExplanation: No failed or pending update remains. {{trend}}.
dashboard.updatesMeaning: Publishing is complete only after provider verification; pending and failed work stays visible.
dashboard.waitForDashboardData: Wait for the dashboard data to finish loading.
dashboard.waitForHealthCheck: Wait for the health check to finish.
dashboard.warningsEmptyExplanation: No current warning requires seller review.
dashboard.warningsExplanation_one: {{value}} warning should be reviewed before publishing.
dashboard.warningsExplanation_other: {{value}} warnings should be reviewed before publishing.
dashboard.warningsMeaning: Warnings allow work to continue but may require a seller decision.
